Never Attend a Hospital Visit Alone Again

Trusted healthcare companions for hospital visits, medical appointments, elderly care, diagnostics, and patient support — because every patient deserves care like family.

Our Services

Compassionate care for every visit

From the moment you book to the safe return home, our companions handle every detail with warmth and professionalism.

Hospital Visit Assistance

Accompany patients throughout hospital visits with empathy and care.

Learn more

Elderly Care Support

Helping seniors attend appointments safely and confidently.

Learn more

Diagnostic Test Assistance

MRI, CT scans, blood tests, lab visits — never feel lost again.

Learn more

Post Surgery Support

Follow-up appointments and gentle recovery support at every step.

Learn more

Patient Transportation

Reliable pickup and drop support for every hospital visit.

Learn more

Family Updates

Real-time updates so families stay informed and reassured.

Learn more
How It Works

Care, in four simple steps

1

Book a Companion

Tell us when and where — book in under 60 seconds.

2

Companion Assigned

A verified, trained companion is matched to your needs.

3

Hospital Assistance

We handle the entire visit — paperwork, doctors, reports.

4

Safe Return Home

Comfortable transportation and a full family update.

Why Well Wisher

Built on trust. Designed for families.

Verified Healthcare Companions
Background Verification
Live Tracking
Emergency Assistance
Family Notifications
Hospital Coordination
Safe Transportation
24/7 Support
98%
Family confidence
Family Peace of Mind

Care for your loved ones, even when you're far away

Whether you're across the city or across the world, Well Wisher is the family member who shows up. We accompany your parents to the hospital, sit through their tests, and send you live updates — so you can be present, even when you can't be there.

For NRIs Working Professionals Elderly Parents
Book Companion Now
Testimonials

Loved by families across India

"I live abroad and worry constantly about my parents. Well Wisher gave me peace of mind I didn't think was possible. Their companion was so kind to my mother."

P
Priya Sharma
Daughter • NRI in London
FAQ

Questions, answered

Trained healthcare professionals — including nurses, paramedics, and certified caregivers — selected for empathy, experience, and reliability.
